mapper.select:
SELECT platform, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, brand_name AS brandName, category, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, n_negative AS nNegative, n_neutral AS nNeutral, n_positive AS nPositive, image_path AS imagePath FROM ( SELECT t.*, (SELECT MAX(r.review_date) FROM t_review r WHERE r.platform = t.platform AND r.product_id = t.product_id) AS latest_review_date FROM t_product t
) ORDER BY
avg_rating ASC, review_count DESC latest_review_date DESC NULLS LAST avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT platform, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, brand_name AS brandName, category, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, n_negative AS nNegative, n_neutral AS nNeutral, n_positive AS nPositive, image_path AS imagePath FROM t_product WHERE platform = #{platform} AND product_id = #{productId}
SELECT DISTINCT category FROM t_product WHERE category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category

SELECT platform, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, brand_name AS brandName, category, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, n_negative AS nNegative, n_neutral AS nNeutral, n_positive AS nPositive, image_path AS imagePath FROM t_product WHERE review_count >= 20 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT platform, product_id AS productId, product_name AS productName, brand_name AS brandName, category, review_count AS reviewCount, avg_rating AS avgRating, n_negative AS nNegative, n_neutral AS nNeutral, n_positive AS nPositive, image_path AS imagePath FROM t_product WHERE category = #{category} AND review_count >= 20 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC, review_count DESC FETCH FIRST 20 ROWS ONLY
SELECT TRUNC(rating) AS rating, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM t_review WHERE platform = #{platform} AND product_id = #{productId} GROUP BY TRUNC(rating) ORDER BY TRUNC(rating)

SELECT brand_name AS brandName, ROUND(SUM(avg_rating * review_count) / SUM(review_count), 2) AS avgRating, COUNT(*) AS productCount FROM t_product WHERE category = #{category} AND brand_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY brand_name ORDER BY avgRating DESC FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_product) AS "productCount", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_review) AS "reviewCount", (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT platform) FROM t_product) AS "platformCount", (SELECT ROUND(AVG(avg_rating), 2) FROM t_product) AS "avgRating" FROM dual
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_product (platform, product_id, product_name, brand_name, category, review_count, avg_rating, n_negative, n_neutral, n_positive) VALUES (#{platform}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{brandName}, #{category}, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE t_product p SET (review_count, avg_rating, n_negative, n_neutral, n_positive) = ( SELECT COUNT(*), NVL(ROUND(AVG(rating), 2), 0), COUNT(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'negative' THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'neutral' THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN sentiment = 'positive' THEN 1 END) FROM t_review r WHERE r.platform = p.platform AND r.product_id = p.product_id ) WHERE p.platform = #{platform} AND p.product_id = #{productId}
